player (player_id, name, email, age, gender, country, total_games_played, join_date)
Q: Get all players who joined after '2022-01-01'
A: SELECT * FROM player WHERE join_date > '2022-01-01'

A: INSERT INTO player (name, email, age, gender, country, total_games_played, join_date) VALUES ('Sarah', 'sarah@email.com', 25, 'Female', 'CA', 0, '2023-03-15')

species_sightings (species_id, location_id, sighted_date, sighted_time, sighted_by)
Q: Delete all sightings for a specific location
A: DELETE FROM species_sightings WHERE location_id = 456
